This call retrieves all assigned budget orders for your organization. It also returns completed and canceled orders. # Get all Budget Orders

**Web Service Endpoint**

Fetches all assigned budget orders for an organization.

## Discussion

This call retrieves all assigned budget orders for your organization. It also returns completed and canceled orders. Budget orders also return when you use the [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/Create-a-Campaign] or [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/Update-a-Campaign] endpoints.

You can’t set budget order invoicing through the API. You can only fetch a budget order using [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/Get-a-Budget-Order] or the [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/Get-all-Budget-Orders] API call.

### Payload example: Get all budget orders



## Budget Order Endpoints

- **Create a Budget Order**: Creates a budget order in the context of your org ID.
- **Update a Budget Order**: Updates an existing budget order.
- **Get a Budget Order**: Fetches a specific budget order using a budget order identifier.
